results.justification: DIRECT TWIN — WhisperPro produces synchronized text tokens + prosody embeddings fed into LLM backbone for paralinguistic understanding.
ProsodyFlow uses prosody latent as conditional input to flow-matching generation.
ProsodyLM uses word-level prosody tokens; covers prosody as conditioning channel.
Generic acoustic conditional inputs; partial coverage.
Duration control via flow matching — prosody-attribute conditioning.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Controllable speech synthesis survey inline emotion control
results.justification: Free-form inline emotion control via natural-language descriptions — prosody/expressive control mechanism survey.
